title: Bare Bones x Cosy Critters & Creepy Crawlies
description: Simplifies the textures of Cosy Critters to match Bare Bones
body:
This pack simplifies the textures of the crows, moths, spiders and hat man to better fit in with Bare Bones.

---

![two crows flying in front of a jungle hill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5yM5UNXz/images/ff21e890324269da8a3e527dfe0d51e83c038d2a.png)

![a swarm of moths around the torches on a village fountain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5yM5UNXz/images/4e13a53a0ccfb5944b5de6f7f32cc6a02a356e1c.png)
